splits.title: Temples
splits.author: Mary Foster Gibbs
splits.start_boundary: Temples. Mary Foster Gibbs All religious forms are symbolic
splits.end_boundary: Buddhism did not go so far, but we shall treat that belief in a latter paper. Beyond

files.notes: This file contains a frontispiece image caption followed by a substantial article on temples by Mary Foster Gibbs. The article appears to continue beyond this file (ends with 'Beyond' suggesting continuation). The frontispiece is a simple image caption, while the main article discusses religious symbolism and temple practices across various cultures.
